tasks.label: Run HealthCalculator
tasks.command: chcp 65001; javac -encoding UTF-8 0702\HealthCalculator.java; if ($LASTEXITCODE -eq 0) { java "-Dfile.encoding=UTF-8" -cp 0702 HealthCalculator }

tasks.label: Run ScoreReport
tasks.command: chcp 65001; javac -encoding UTF-8 0702\ScoreReport.java; if ($LASTEXITCODE -eq 0) { java "-Dfile.encoding=UTF-8" -cp 0702 ScoreReport }
